## New Skill Checklist

- [ ] `SKILL.md` has `name` and `description` in frontmatter
- [ ] `name` matches directory name (lowercase, hyphens only)
- [ ] `description` includes trigger phrases ("Use when...")
- [ ] SKILL.md is under 500 lines / 5,000 tokens
- [ ] Detailed reference material is in `references/`, not inline
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or internal URLs in skill content
- [ ] README.md skills table updated
